title: Buster Bathroom Plughole Unblocker, 300ml, Pack of 6, Unblock Hair & Sludge from Showers, Baths & Sinks – Fast-Acting Plughole Unclogger, Clears Blockages & Slow-Draining Water
features: BATHROOM SINK UNBLOCKER: Buster Bathroom Plughole Unblocker (Pack of 6x 300ml) is the one-shot drain unblocker specially designed to blast away hair and soap scum in bathroom drains fast

TARGETS HAIR & SLUDGE: Buster clears bathroom plugholes from the build-up of hair, soap scum and sludge; these are the common plughole nasties that, if not treated regularly, cause the dreaded bathroom plughole blockage

FOR SHOWERS, BATHS & BASINS: Buster Bathroom Plughole Unblocker is specially formulated to tackle the causes of blockages inside your bathroom pipes. It’s suitable for showers, baths, sink plugholes and is safe to use on septic systems

STOPS SLOW DRAINING WATER & BLOCKAGES: Whether it’s a full blockage or slow draining water, Buster’s fast-acting formula gets to work in 15 minutes (for best results leave overnight), dissolving hair and clearing sludge to keep water flowing freely

YOUR PLUGHOLE EXPERTS: For over 30 years we’ve worked obsessively to make plughole care products that are effective and simply get the job done, from clearing and preventing blockages to cleaning and sanitising. So go on, Bust out the Buster
description: Product Description Buster Bathroom Plughole Unblocker (Pack of 6x 300ml) is the one-shot plughole unclogger specially designed to blast away hair and soap scum in bathroom drains fast. Blockages and slow draining water in the bathroom are usually caused by the same things – hair, soap and sludge. These plughole nasties are constantly building up inside the pipes. Buster Bathroom Plughole Unblocker has a unique formulation that tackles this build-up. Whether it’s a full blockage or slow draining water, Buster gets to work quickly, dissolving hair and clearing sludge to keep water flowing freely. Its mighty one-shot power action is fast-acting and drops straight to the blockage, getting to work quickly. To use, remove as much standing water as you can then carefully pour the entire 300ml bottle slowly down the plughole and wipe away any residue. Leave for at least 15 minutes (for best results leave overnight), then flush through with lots of hot water. Buster Bathroom Plughole Unblocker is suitable for bathroom showers, baths and basins and is safe to use on septic systems. So go on, bust out the Buster to keep your plughole flowing. Ingredients <5% chlorine-based bleaching agents, <5% non-ionic surfactants, <5% perfumes Directions Remove as much standing water as you can then carefully pour the entire 300ml bottle slowly down the plughole and wipe away any residue. Leave for at least 15 minutes (for best results leave overnight), then flush through with lots of hot water. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wear protective gloves and eyewear. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Do not mix with other chemicals. See more
